title: L4 vs. L7 Load Balancing
description: Compare the capabilities and use cases of Layer 4 (TCP) and Layer 7 (HTTP) load balancing. Evaluate the performance and feature trade-offs between packet switching and application-aware routing. Select appropriate load balancing strategies based on application requirements for throughput and intelligence.
objectives: Compare the capabilities and use cases of Layer 4 (TCP) and Layer 7 (HTTP) load balancing.
Evaluate the performance and feature trade-offs between packet switching and application-aware routing.
Select appropriate load balancing strategies based on application requirements for throughput and intelligence.
